title: I Am Calm and Confident at Any Scale
subtitle: An affirmation for anchoring safety and confidence at the level of multi-million investment
excerpt: A brief affirmation from the Day 75 theme of a 12-week money programme. The statement names safety, calm, and confidence as present-tense facts at whatever scale investment reaches, including the multi-million level.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 75 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448).

practice.whenToUse: Use in the morning when the scale of investment you are working toward makes you feel small or unqualified to proceed.

content.text: A brief affirmation from the Day 75 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 75 centres on anchoring trust in multi-million investment decisions. The statement makes safety and confidence present-tense at any scale — the size of the number doesn't change the internal state.
Say it in the morning, hand on heart. Three times. Notice whether the scale of the number feels different when the internal state stays steady.
I am safe, calm, and confident managing multi-million investments. The scale does not change my steady ground.
Adapted from the Day 75 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
